name: Icecap Ltd
description: ICECAP provides corporate administration solutions and specialises in administering alternative assets. It works with a full spectrum of clients from global law firms and banking institutions through to SMEs across Europe, Asia, Middle East and Africa.
website_content:
top of page
#### ICECAP provides corporate administration solutions and specialises in administering alternative assets. We work with a full spectrum of clients from global law firms and banking institutions through to SMEs across Europe, Asia, Middle East and Africa.
#### ICECAP provides corporate administration solutions and specialises in administering alternative assets. We work with a full spectrum of clients from global law firms and banking institutions through to SMEs across Europe, Asia, Middle East and Africa.

Personal | Experienced | Responsive
#### ICECAP is an independent trust company with offices in [Jersey](https://www.icecapltd.com/jersey-office) and [Mauritius ](https://www.icecapltd.com/mauritius-office)[providing corporate, private client and fund services](https://www.icecapltd.com/mauritius-office).
![Corporate Services Jersey Offshore](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/cbd951_8aae161b65034d598e49553a4213e118~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_467,h_330,al_c,lg_1,q_80,enc_avif,quality_auto/Home.jpg)
As an independent and manager owned company, we are intent on building strong and long-term personal relationships with all of our clients.
Our service model is based on a personalised, director-led offering with complete certainty and transparency around fees.
​
​​Talk to us >

### Global presence
![Jersey-Home.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/cbd951_41d4cbfa146849ad8bb3f3a7f1b5ba8f~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_0,y_36,w_300,h_254/fill/w_298,h_245,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Jersey-Home.jpg)
Jersey
International finance centre
[](https://www.icecapltd.com/jersey-office)
#### [Jersey Office](https://www.icecapltd.com/jersey-office)
ICECAPS’s head office is located on the island of Jersey, one of the world’s leading international finance centres (IFCs) and has been rated as the top [Offshore Jurisdiction ](https://www.icecapltd.com/jersey-office)for seven consecutive editions of the Global Financial Centres Index.
​
###### [Learn more >](https://www.icecapltd.com/jersey-office)
![Image by Xavier  Coiffic](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/nsplsh_427941486c526954516a6f~mv2_d_5472_3648_s_4_2.jpg/v1/crop/x_517,y_0,w_4437,h_3648/fill/w_298,h_245,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Image%20by%20Xavier%20%20Coiffic.jpg)
Mauritius
Gateway to Asia and Africa
[](https://www.icecapltd.com/mauritius-office)
#### [Mauritius Office](https://www.icecapltd.com/mauritius-office)
ICECAP's Mauritius office provides a platform for [Africa and Asia investment.](https://www.icecapltd.com/african-case-studies) As at June 2021, nearly USD 40 billion investments directed to Africa were structured through Mauritius.
​
[Learn more >](https://www.icecapltd.com/jersey-office)

Should you be interested in speaking with ICECAP to advise you please contact a member of our team directly or submit an enquiry toenquiries@icecapltd.com
I can offer nothing but substantial praise for the fantastic job performed by the ICECAP team, from the initial meeting and discussion, to guiding us through what initially seemed like an insurmountable mountain of red tape.
